data.title: T. Hasegawa Announces Director Responsibility Changes
data.description:
An update from T Hasegawa Co ( (JP:4958) ) is now available.

T. Hasegawa Co., Ltd. announced changes in director responsibilities, effective April 1, 2025, with Masayasu Amaike taking on new roles in sales, marketing, and global business. This strategic realignment is expected to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and strengthen its market position.

More about T Hasegawa Co

T. Hasegawa Co., Ltd. operates in the flavor and fragrance industry, providing a range of products and services focused on enhancing taste and aroma for various consumer goods. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, indicating its significant presence and influence in the market.

YTD Price Performance: 1.12%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

data.title: Ashtead Announces Director’s New Role at Kingfisher
data.description:
The latest update is out from Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ).

Ashtead Group plc has announced that Lucinda Riches, currently serving as a non-executive director and Remuneration Committee chair, will take on the role of senior independent director at Kingfisher plc starting 23 June 2025. This appointment highlights the recognition of Riches’ expertise and may influence Ashtead’s strategic positioning by strengthening its leadership ties with another prominent company.

data.title: 4imprint Group PLC’s Employee Trust Acquires Additional Shares
data.description:
The latest update is out from 4Imprint ( (GB:FOUR) ).

4imprint Group PLC announced that its 2012 Employee Benefit Trust (EBT) has acquired 20,000 ordinary shares at £38.75 each, increasing the EBT’s holdings to 49,816 shares, which represents 0.18% of the company’s total voting rights. This purchase underscores the company’s commitment to benefiting its employees and directors, who are potential beneficiaries of the trust, potentially impacting their engagement and motivation.

More about 4Imprint

4imprint Group PLC operates in the promotional products industry, providing a range of branded merchandise and marketing solutions. The company focuses on delivering promotional items to businesses and organizations, enhancing brand visibility and engagement.

data.title: Boku, Inc. Announces Change in Voting Rights Structure
data.description:
BOKU ( (GB:BOKU) ) just unveiled an update.

Boku, Inc. has announced a change in its voting rights structure following an acquisition or disposal of shares by Octopus Investments Limited. The transaction resulted in Octopus Investments holding 12.99% of Boku’s voting rights, a slight decrease from its previous position. This adjustment in holdings could impact Boku’s shareholder dynamics and influence future corporate decisions.

More about BOKU

Boku, Inc. operates in the financial technology industry, specializing in mobile payment solutions. The company focuses on enabling consumers to make payments using their mobile devices, catering to a global market with a significant presence in the UK.

data.title: Wallenius Wilhelmsen’s Sale of MIRRAT Under ACCC Review
data.description:
Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA ( (DE:WNL) ) has issued an announcement.

Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA has announced the sale of its Melbourne International RoRo & Auto Terminal Pty Ltd (MIRRAT) to Australian Amalgamated Terminals Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of Qube Holdings Limited. The transaction is currently under review by the Australian Competition & Consumer Commission (ACCC), with a decision expected by March 27, 2025. The outcome of this review could significantly impact the company’s operations and market positioning in Australia.

More about Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA

data.title: CIE Automotive Announces Shareholders’ Meeting and Financial Results
data.description:
CIE Automotive ( (ES:CIE) ) has issued an update.

CIE Automotive has announced the convening of its Ordinary General Shareholders’ Meeting to be held on May 7, 2025. The meeting will address several key agenda items, including the approval of the 2024 financial year accounts, management reports, and the application of the year’s financial results. Additionally, the resignation of Mr. Shriniprakash Shukla from the Board of Directors has been communicated due to his retirement from Mahindra & Mahindra. The financial results for 2024 indicate a total profit of €122,430, with dividends and reserves allocated accordingly.

More about CIE Automotive

CIE Automotive is a company operating in the automotive industry, focusing on the production and supply of automotive components and services. The company is known for its involvement in various segments of the automotive supply chain, catering to a global market.

data.title: Piovan SpA Announces Virtual Ordinary Meeting for 2025
data.description:
Piovan SpA ( (IT:PVN) ) has issued an update.

Piovan SpA has announced an Ordinary Meeting scheduled for April 29, 2025, to discuss the approval of the 2024 financial statements, remuneration policy, and other corporate matters. The meeting will be held without physical shareholder participation, utilizing a designated representative for proxy voting, reflecting ongoing adaptations to regulatory changes and ensuring shareholder engagement.

Piovan SpA operates in the industrial sector, focusing on providing auxiliary equipment and services for the storage, transport, and processing of plastics. The company is known for its advanced technological solutions and has a significant market presence in the plastic processing industry.

data.title: Norsk Hydro Asa to Invest in New Wire Rod Plant at Karmøy
data.description:
Norsk Hydro Asa ( (GB:0Q11) ) has shared an update.

Norsk Hydro Asa announced its largest investment in Norway in a decade with a new wire rod plant at Karmøy, expected to begin production in 2028. This facility will enhance Hydro’s capacity to supply low-carbon aluminum for Europe’s critical energy infrastructure, supporting the continent’s energy transition and climate goals. Despite a challenging aluminum market, Hydro has seen increased sales of low-carbon aluminum, highlighting the material’s advantages in weight, durability, and recyclability. The project, part of Hydro’s annual investment budget, aims to position the company as a key supplier in the growing market for renewable energy infrastructure.

More about Norsk Hydro Asa

Norsk Hydro Asa is a leading company in the aluminum industry, focusing on providing low-carbon aluminum solutions. It plays a significant role in Europe’s energy infrastructure by supplying aluminum, a critical material for power cables and renewable energy systems.

YTD Price Performance: 9.57%

Average Trading Volume: 16,940

data.title: Panther Metals Unveils Promising Drilling Results at Dotted Lake
data.description:
An announcement from Panther Metals Plc ( (GB:PALM) ) is now available.

Panther Metals PLC announced significant findings from its Phase 1 Diamond Drilling Programme at the Dotted Lake Project in Ontario, Canada. The latest assay results reveal wide intercepts of magnesium-rich serpentinite, containing valuable metals such as nickel, platinum, and palladium. These findings expand the known extent of the ultramafic rock intrusion and highlight the potential for economic mineral deposits. The company plans further research to explore the commercial potential of magnesium separation from serpentinite, which has not been industrially applied before.

More about Panther Metals Plc

Panther Metals PLC is an exploration company listed on the London Stock Exchange, focusing on discovering commercially viable mineral deposits. The company operates primarily in established mining jurisdictions, with a current focus on three properties in Ontario, Canada. Panther Metals rapidly assesses drill targets using advanced technologies and extensive geological data to determine commercial viability.

YTD Price Performance: -51.76%

Average Trading Volume: 19,947

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £2.15M
